title: Missing path validation on CLI args
evidence: const specFolder = ensureString(args, 'specFolder'); - no validation before use in db.getNodes(ns) where ns = { specFolder, loopType, sessionId }
fix: Add path validation using path.resolve() and check that the path is within expected bounds before use

title: DB lifecycle pattern deviates from ADR-001 contract
evidence: try { ... } finally { db.closeDb(); } - direct pattern instead of the documented shared helper
fix: Either implement the documented withDatabase helper in scripts/_lib/db-open.cjs and update all scripts to use it, or update ADR-001 to reflect the actual implementation pattern

title: TSX loader path assumes specific directory structure
fix: Consider making the TSX loader path configurable via environment variable or detecting it at runtime

title: Lock file path in loop-lock.ts is relative to caller
evidence: export function acquireLoopLock(lockPath: string, data: LoopLockData): LoopLockAcquireResult - no path validation or default construction
fix: Add a helper function to construct the default lock path relative to the skill's storage directory and validate the path is within expected bounds
